title: hieracium levicaule subsp. lucescens
intro: Hieracium levicaule subsp. lucescens, also known as hawkweed, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion family. The medicinal properties of Hieracium levicaule subsp. lucescens include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat various conditions such as wounds, skin issues, and viral infections, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and fight off oxidative stress. Hieracium levicaule subsp. lucescens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote healing and overall well-being.
